welcome.title: Genshin Wish Simulator - Full Strategy Edition
welcome.speed_1: 1 - Realistic pace (1s pause every 10 pulls, suitable for small-scale experience)
welcome.speed_2: 2 - Fast mode (no pauses, suitable for large-scale simulations)

target.select_banners: Select banners to set targets (separate by commas, e.g., C1,W):
target.input_char: Set target for {banner} ({name}) (positive integer, e.g., 7 for C6, 0 for no limit):
target.input_w1: Azurelight target (positive integer, 0 for no limit):
target.input_w2: Symphonist of Scents target (positive integer, 0 for no limit):
target.dual_question: Are you aiming for both limited weapons? (Y/N):
target.weapon_max: • Theoretical max: 240 pulls (lost to standard + lost to other UP + epitomized path)
target.dual_weapon_note: Note: Dual limited weapon strategy mode enabled.
target.dual_weapon_exp: Expected pulls for one of each limited weapon: ~158.5
target.dual_weapon_strategy: Optimal strategy can achieve both in ~3 golds (≈240 pulls).
target.press_any: Press any key to start wishing...

banner.w_info: W: Weapon banner (Azurelight / Symphonist of Scents)   4★ UP: {ups}
banner.note_weapon: Note: Weapon banner 4★ distribution: 75% UP weapons, 12.5% non-UP weapons, 12.5% 4★ characters
banner.note_char: Note: Character banner 4★ distribution: 50% UP characters, 25% non-UP characters, 25% 4★ weapons
banner.note_four: Note: 4★ UP guarantee: if a 4★ is not UP, the next 4★ is guaranteed to be UP
banner.note_weapon_pause: Note: Weapon banner pauses after every 5★, providing strategy options

command.pull_count: • Pull count can be any positive integer (e.g., 1 single, 10 ten-pull)
command.w1_example: W 20 W1 - 20 pulls on weapon banner, Epitomized Path set to Azurelight
command.w2_example: W 3 W2  - 3 pulls on weapon banner, Epitomized Path set to Symphonist of Scents
command.y_repeat: Y       - Repeat last pull command (count, banner, and Epitomized Path)
command.s_end: S       - End pulls and export data
command.invalid_format: ❌ Invalid format! Example: C1 50 or W 20 W1
command.invalid_banner: ❌ Invalid banner code! Enter C1, C2, or W
command.invalid_count: ❌ Pull count must be a positive integer!
command.completed: ✅ This pull command completed. You may continue entering commands.
command.hint: Hint: C1(Skirk) / C2(Escoffier) <count> or W(Weapon) <count> W1(Azurelight)/W2(Symphonist of Scents), Y repeat, S end
command.disabled_pool: ❌ {banner} banner already reached target and stopped. Restart the program if you wish to continue.

status.title: [Status] Total pulls: {total} (C1:{c1}, C2:{c2}, W:{w}) | Primogems: {primogems} | Starglitter: {glitter} | Stardust: {dust}
status.limited_summary: 📊 Current limited items: Skirk {skk} ({skk_cons} cons), Escoffier {akf} ({akf_cons} cons), Azurelight {w1}, Symphonist of Scents {w2}

weapon.option4: 4-Execute strategy: cancel and reset path to current weapon (bet on the other)
weapon.option5: 5-Execute strategy: cancel and reset path to current weapon (bet on the other)
weapon.enter_new: Enter new Epitomized Path code (W1 Azurelight / W2 Symphonist of Scents):
weapon.default: Invalid input, defaulting to continue without Epitomized Path.
weapon.log_strategy: Executed dual limited strategy: cancel and reset path to {weapon}

export.title: Pull session ended. Choose export option:
export.completed: ✅ All operations completed. Output saved in: {output_dir}

luck.level9_desc: Beyond human limits, pulling is as easy as breathing.
luck.level8_desc: True lucky one, average pulls below expectation, very low loss rate.
luck.level7_desc: Above average luck, often early pulls, occasional losses are acceptable.
luck.level6_desc: Pretty lucky, comfortable experience, frequent small surprises.
luck.level5_desc: Strictly follows mathematical expectation, neither good nor bad, represents most players.
luck.level4_desc: Often hits hard pity, but occasional highlights; keep going!
luck.level3_desc: Loses a bit too often, but don't lose heart; next time will be better!
luck.level2_desc: Standard characters outnumber limited ones; think of it as having more 'old friends'.
luck.level1_desc: Endured unimaginable pulls yet still loves the game; this perseverance is admirable!
